positive: A whimsical and stylish illustration of a group of diverse woodland animals—a fox, a rabbit, a bear cub, and a squirrel—gathered around a glowing, oversized teacup. The scene should be depicted in a detailed, storybook narrative style, reminiscent of Beatrix Potter mixed with whimsical modern Disney concept art. Emphasize strong, clean silhouettes and clear line work. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, suitable for a central chest print on apparel. The color palette should be rich jewel tones (emerald, sapphire, deep amethyst) contrasted with natural pastels (creamy whites, moss green, warm beige). Lighting should be dramatic and soft, emanating from the central teacup. Style: high-contrast vector illustration, woodcut engraving texture applied subtly, perfect for commercial merchandise. Aspect: square, detailed focus.
negative: blurry, deformed, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, messy, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, out of frame, signature, logos, brand names
